title: Item tint
description: [deprecated] Tints the items according to the biome (polytone)
body:
## [Changes in the new 1.21.4 item model system broke the item tint packs I made, and there doesnt seem to be a good solution so far, so they are going archived now. Sorry](https://github.com/MehVahdJukaar/polytone/issues/135)

### **_[REQUIRES POLYTONE](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)_**

Tints the items in the inventory that have biome colors

This includes water buckets, leaves, grass, and other foliage. It also works with other resource packs that change the colormaps, like water and foliage
